checkout.ask_screenshot: Send the payment screenshot as a photo.
checkout.ask_txid: Screenshot received. Now paste the Binance Transaction ID (TxID).
checkout.bybit_instructions: USDT on BSC (auto-confirm) Order: {code} Send exactly {amount}{idr_line} of USDT on the BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) network to: {address} ⚠ Send the EXACT amount above — we auto-confirm by matching it, so an even-rounded amount won't be recognised. ⚠ Use the BEP20 / BNB Smart Chain network only. Other networks are lost. ⏳ Pay before {expiry}. Delivery is automatic once the deposit confirms (~1–2 min) — no screenshot needed.
checkout.confirm_order: Confirm Order Product: {product} Quantity: {qty} Price: {unit_price} × {qty} {voucher_line}Total: {total} Proceed to payment?
checkout.internal_instructions: Binance Transfer (auto-confirm) Order: {code} Send {amount}{idr_line} via Binance → Send → by UID to: UID: {uid} Note/Memo: {note} ⚠ You must put the Note above so we can auto-confirm. ⏳ Pay before {expiry}. Delivery is automatic once received — no screenshot needed.
checkout.internal_paid: ✅ Payment received! Order {code} is confirmed and your items are being delivered now.
checkout.nowpayments_instructions: USDT via NOWPayments (auto-confirm) Order: {code} Amount: {amount} Tap the button below to open the hosted payment page and pay with any supported crypto. ⏳ Pay before {expiry}. Delivery is automatic once the payment confirms — no screenshot needed.
checkout.qris_paid: ✅ Payment received! Order {code} is confirmed and your items are being delivered now.
checkout.paydisini_instructions: 🧾 Order {code} Scan the QR below with any QRIS or e-wallet app to pay. 💵 Amount: {amount} ⏳ Pay before: {expiry} Delivery is automatic once your payment is confirmed.
checkout.qris_instructions: 🧾 Order {code} Scan the QR below with any QRIS app (GoPay, OVO, DANA, bank). 💵 Amount: {amount} ⏳ Pay before: {expiry} Delivery is automatic once your payment is confirmed.
checkout.payment_unavailable: Payments aren't available right now — the shop hasn't finished setting up. Please try again later.
checkout.payment_instructions: Payment Instructions Order: {code} Amount: {total} Send exactly the amount above to: Binance Pay ID: {binance_id} ⚠ The amount includes a unique identifier — do not round it. ⏳ Time remaining: {countdown} After transfer, tap the button below and upload your screenshot + Transaction ID.
checkout.proof_submitted: ✓ Proof received. Order {code} is now pending verification. You will receive a notification once reviewed.
checkout.reminder_1min: 🚨 Last minute! Order {code} expires in 1 minute. Amount: {total} Tap I've Paid to upload proof now or the order will be cancelled.
checkout.reminder_2min: ⚠️ 2 minutes left! Order {code} will expire soon. Amount: {total} Binance Pay ID: {binance_id} Upload your payment proof before time runs out.
checkout.still_pending_toast: Payment not received yet. Still waiting…

faq.content: FAQ Q: How long does delivery take? A: After payment verification, delivery is automatic — usually under 30 minutes during business hours. Q: What about warranty? A: Most accounts include a 30-day replacement warranty. Contact support if anything stops working. Q: Can I get a refund? A: Refunds are considered case by case. We always attempt a replacement first. Q: Why does the payment amount have odd decimals? A: A unique identifier is added to each order for payment matching. Do not round the amount.
help.title: 🆘 Help Center What do you need help with?
howtopay.content: How to Pay via Binance Pay 1. Open Binance → Pay → Send. 2. Enter the Binance Pay ID shown at checkout. 3. Send the exact amount (with unique decimals). 4. Take a screenshot of the successful transfer. 5. Tap "I've Paid" and upload the screenshot + Transaction ID. Verification is manual — usually within 30 minutes during business hours.
order.auto_cancelled: Order {code} was auto-cancelled — payment window expired. Stock has been released.
order.delivered_credentials: ✅ Order Delivered Successfully ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🧾 Order Code {code} 🔑 Your Credentials {credentials} ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🛡 Warranty · {warranty} days 💬 Contact support if anything stops working. ⭐ Don't forget to leave a review!
order.delivered_caption: ✅ Order {code} delivered! 🛡 Warranty {warranty} days 📎 Your account(s) are in the attached file below.
order.pending_payment_detail: Order {code} — ⏳ Awaiting Payment {lines} Amount: {total} Pay to Binance ID: {binance_id} ⏳ Time remaining: {countdown}
referral.info: Referral Program Share your link and earn {percent}% commission on each new user’s first purchase. Earnings go to your wallet. Your link: {link} Referrals: {count} Total earned: {earned}
search.no_results: No products found for {query}. Try a different keyword.
start.dashboard: Hello {name} | {now} User Info : └ ID : {tg_id} └ Username : {username} └ Transactions : {spent} BOT Stats : └ Items Sold : {items_sold} items └ Total Transactions : {total_revenue} └ Total Users : {total_users} Shortcuts : /start – Start bot /listproduk – View product list /language – Change language
start.welcome:
Welcome, {name}.

This bot sells premium digital accounts.
Pick a product from the list or use the menu below.
support.admin_reply: Reply from support: {message} If your issue is resolved, tap the button below to close this ticket.
support.ask_photos: Description received. You may attach up to 3 photos as evidence (optional). Send photos one by one, or tap the button below to submit.
support.intro: Support Describe your issue below. An admin will reply here.
support.photo_added: Photo {count}/3 received. Send another or tap Submit.
support.received: Your message has been forwarded to support. We will reply shortly.
support.ticket_closed: Your ticket has been closed. Open a new one if you need further help.
terms.content: Terms of Service By using this bot you agree to: • Not share delivered credentials publicly. • Not change passwords on shared accounts. • Contact support before opening a dispute. • Respect the warranty period for replacements. All sales are final once delivered and outside warranty.
ticket.auto_closed: Ticket #{ticket_id} was automatically closed after 48 hours of inactivity. Open a new one if you still need help.
ticket.closed_cannot_reply: This ticket is closed. Open a new one via Support.
ticket.reply_sent: Reply sent. Admin will respond shortly.

wallet.topup_info: Contact support to top up your wallet.

web.discounts_at_checkout: Quantity deals & voucher codes are applied at checkout.

web.pay_method: How would you like to pay?
web.pay_idr_sub: Pay the exact Rupiah price. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_paydisini_sub: Pay the exact Rupiah price via QRIS or e-wallet. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_paydisini_disabled: This payment method isn't available yet.
web.pay_nowpayments_sub: Pay the USDT amount via a hosted crypto payment page. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_nowpayments_disabled: This payment method isn't available yet.
web.pay_usdt_sub: Pay the USDT amount shown next to the price. Confirmed automatically.
web.pay_bybit_sub: Send USDT on BNB Smart Chain to our Bybit deposit address. Auto-confirmed.
web.pay_bybit_disabled: Bybit deposit is not configured yet.
web.pay_bybit_note: Delivery is automatic once the deposit is credited — no proof needed.
web.pay_method_elsewhere: Finish paying for this order where you started it (in our Telegram bot).
web.pay_method_unavailable: That payment method isn't available right now — pick another one.
web.binance_step_open: Open the Binance app and choose Pay → Transfer to Binance User (UID).
web.binance_step_note: Put this code in the transfer note:
web.binance_auto_note: We confirm your transfer automatically — this page updates by itself, no screenshots needed.
web.tokopay_auto_note: Scan the QR or open the payment page — this page updates by itself once you've paid.
web.paydisini_auto_note: Scan the QR or open the payment page — this page updates by itself once you've paid.
web.nowpayments_auto_note: Open the payment page to pay with any supported crypto — this page updates by itself once you've paid.
web.pay_idr_down_body: Our QRIS provider is having a short outage. Please try again in a moment — your order is saved and the price won't change.
web.pay_trust: Secure payment · your product is delivered automatically — no screenshots needed.
web.pay_done_sub: Your credentials are ready in My orders.
web.pay_confirming: Payment received — finishing up your order…
web.pay_expired: This order's payment window has expired. Your items are still in stock — order again from your cart.
web.features_sub: Safe, fast, and pleasant digital shopping.
web.feat_instant_d: Products are delivered automatically within minutes of payment.
web.feat_warranty_d: Every product is covered — if something breaks, we fix it.
web.feat_support_d: Our team is ready any time via Telegram & WhatsApp.
web.feat_trusted_d: Trusted by thousands of customers with five-star reviews.
web.feat_verified_d: Every product is checked before it goes on sale.
web.testi_1: Activation worked within minutes of paying. Three months subscribed now, zero problems!
web.testi_2: All premium features genuinely active. Student-friendly prices, and any issue gets sorted right away.
web.testi_3: Tried several shops — this one is the most reliable. Stock always available, consistent prices, fast replies. Recommended!
web.testi_4: Had an activation hiccup once and it was fixed in under an hour. The warranty is real. I'll be back!
web.faq_sub: Answers to the questions we hear most often
web.faq_a1: Once payment is confirmed, the product is delivered to your account automatically. Product details (credentials, codes, etc.) appear on your order page.
web.faq_a2: Yes! Products are covered. If a product doesn't work or doesn't match its description, contact us and we'll fix it at no extra cost.
web.faq_a3: We accept QRIS and USDT. Every payment is verified automatically.
web.faq_a4: Usually 1–10 minutes after payment is confirmed. Cases that need a manual check take at most 1–2 hours during working hours.
web.faq_a5: Open a support ticket from your Account page, or reach us on Telegram / WhatsApp. Our team is on 24 hours a day.
web.contact_sub: We're here to help — pick whichever way is easiest
web.contact_ticket_sub: Open a ticket on the site
web.contact_hours: Online 24 hours, 7 days a week. Average response under an hour.
admin.stock_err_no_valid: ⚠️ No valid credentials found. Expected format: email:password or email|password|extra One per line.
admin.voucher_step1: 🎟 Create Voucher — Step 1/3 Send the voucher code (3–32 chars, A–Z/0–9/_/-).
admin.voucher_step2: 🎟 Create Voucher — Step 2/3 ✓ Code: {code} Send the type and value, e.g. percent 10 (10% off) or fixed 5 (5 USDT off).
admin.voucher_step3: 🎟 Create Voucher — Step 3/3 ✓ Code: {code} ✓ Discount: {discount} Send the usage limit (whole number, 0 = unlimited).
admin.voucher_err_exists: ⚠️ That code already exists. Pick another.
admin.voucher_err_value: ⚠️ Value must be a positive number.
admin.voucher_created: ✅ Voucher created. 🎟 Code: {code} 💸 Discount: {discount} 🔁 Usage limit: {limit}
admin.user_search_ask: 🔎 Send a query (username, full name, or Telegram user ID):
admin.setting_prompt_binance_pay_id: 💳 Send the new Binance Pay ID (the numeric ID buyers transfer USDT to).
admin.setting_prompt_qr: 🖼 Send the new QR image as a photo. It will be shown to buyers at checkout.
admin.setting_prompt_banner_image: 📢 Send the new banner image as a photo. It appears on top of the main menu and the product list (never on payment screens). Send - to remove the banner.
admin.setting_prompt_welcome: 👋 Send the new welcome message. • Use {name} as a placeholder for the user's name. • HTML tags allowed (e.g. <b>bold</b>). • Send - to reset to the default message.
admin.setting_prompt_support_contact: 📞 Send the support contact (e.g. @yourusername or t.me/yourchannel). It will appear on /support. Send - to clear.
admin.prod_step1: 🛍 New Product — Step 1/6 Send the product name (e.g. Netflix Premium 1M).
admin.prod_step2: 🛍 New Product — Step 2/6 ✓ Name: {name} Pick the product type.
admin.prod_step3: 🛍 New Product — Step 3/6 ✓ Name: {name} ✓ Type: {type} Send the duration label (e.g. 1 Month).
admin.prod_step5: 🛍 New Product — Step 5/6 ✓ Price: {price} Send the reseller price in USDT (or - to skip).
admin.prod_step6: 🛍 New Product — Step 6/6 Send the warranty days (e.g. 30, or - for the default).
admin.prod_err_price: ⚠️ Invalid. Send a positive number, e.g. 5.00.
admin.prod_err_reseller: ⚠️ Invalid. Send a positive number or - to skip.
admin.prod_err_warranty: ⚠️ Invalid. Send a non-negative whole number or -.
admin.prod_created: ✅ Product {name} created. Next: add stock via /admin → 📦 Stock.
admin.bulk_step1: 💰 Bulk Pricing — Step 1/2 Send the minimum quantity (whole number ≥ 5). Customers who buy at least this many units get the discount.
admin.bulk_step2: 💰 Bulk Pricing — Step 2/2 ✓ Min quantity: {minQty} Send the discount percent (1–99, e.g. 10).
admin.banner_removed_undo: ✅ Banner removed. Tap ↩️ Undo below to restore it (within 30 seconds).
admin.undo_expired: Undo window expired — banner stays removed.
error.stale_screen: This screen is outdated — send /start to open a fresh menu.
